task_completion.description: Access the Muncie model results data (HDF5 file).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing a script or terminal command opening or reading the Muncie.p04.hdf file.

task_completion.description: Identify the five most upstream cross-sections (highest River Station numbers).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Script logic sorting or filtering River Stations to select the top 5 highest values, or terminal output showing the 5 selected stations.

task_completion.description: Calculate the ground elevation at the target station (Left Bank Station - 50) using linear interpolation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code showing the calculation 'Left Bank Station - 50' and a linear interpolation function (e.g., numpy.interp) applied to the cross-section station and elevation arrays.

task_completion.description: Calculate the flood depth as Max WSE minus ground elevation, reporting 0.0 if negative.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code showing the subtraction of ground elevation from Max WSE and logic to floor the result at 0.0 (e.g., max(0, depth)).

task_completion.description: Save the results to a CSV file with the specified headers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File explorer, terminal (e.g., cat command), or text editor showing the creation of 'overbank_depth_assessment.csv' at the correct path with headers: River_Station, Left_Bank_Station_ft, Target_Station_ft, Ground_Elev_ft, Max_WSE_ft, Flood_Depth_ft.

task_completion.description: Save a summary text file to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File explorer, terminal, or text editor showing the creation of 'assessment_summary.txt' at /home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_results/.

integrity.description: Agent processed the actual HDF5 data rather than hardcoding answers.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of a script (e.g., Python) that imports libraries like h5py or pandas and programmatically reads the Muncie.p04.hdf file.

integrity.description: Agent did not simply copy-paste a pre-made CSV or text file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The CSV and text files are generated as outputs of the agent's script execution, visible in terminal logs or script write commands.

integrity.description: Outputs are saved in the exact requested directories.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file paths for the CSV and TXT files exactly match /home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_results/.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected CSV path is /home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_results/overbank_depth_assessment.csv. The HDF5 file is located at /home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_projects/Muncie/Muncie.p04.hdf. The offset distance is exactly 50 feet (Left Bank Station - 50). The agent must process the 5 most upstream cross-sections.
